payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped dark-stained wooden kitchen cabinet front beneath a stone-look countertop with a stainless sink visible; shows a raised-panel door and horizontal top rail with some scuffs and shadowing, photographed close-up (approx. 0.6 m from camera).
